title: selaginella moritziana var. normalis
intro: Selaginella moritziana var. normalis, also known as Spikemoss or Spike Moss, is a species of plant in the genus Selaginella, a type of evergreen, perennial fern ally that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Asian cultures, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Selaginella moritziana var. normalis is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential interactions with other medications.
